editions.flavor: As the clash in Azoth intensified, many wondered: could an Oasis truly exist in a world where the line between rebellion and liberation was blurred?
Behind garden walls, the lone blossom stands, praised only for its beauty.
"I will not forget my mission. I will have revenge."
“You can never be too prepared when facing the flames of the unknown.”

effect: **On Enter:** **Glimpse 6**. Draw six cards. Then **summon** a Spirit Shard token.
effect_raw: On Enter: Glimpse 6. Draw six cards. Then summon a Spirit Shard token.
flavor: Fissures skate across Flagma's mantle. Gouts of flame torch the Oasis. Uncontrollable magma spills forth as the fragmented leyline burns itself to a cinder.
name: Fragmented Spirit of Fire

result_editions.flavor: "I will not forget my mission. I will have revenge."
“You can never be too prepared when facing the flames of the unknown.”
Behind garden walls, the lone blossom stands, praised only for its beauty.

effect_html: On Enter: Glimpse 6. Draw six cards. Then summon a Spirit Shard token.

editions.flavor: Suzaku, mythical Shenju of flames. Purge this land clear of torment and hate so that we may live again.
“Destiny is often dealt, not chosen. True winners are those who bow to it with resolve.”
Seasons passed as she wilted beneath the weight of admiration.
“If I let the pain fade, so too will the fire that drives me.”

effect: **On Enter**: **Glimpse 7**. Draw seven cards into your memory.
effect_raw: On Enter: Glimpse 7. Draw seven cards into your memory.
name: Spirit of Fortuitous Fire

editions.flavor: History encased in ice, thawing to unveil the past many sought to erase. A chilling reminder that alchemical revelations often come at a price.
"Ready to make some waves?"
“I must dispel my doubts and trust the path I’ve chosen. Only then can I prove my resolve.”
"Do you know what it is like to lose everything? Let me show you."

effect: **On Enter:** **Glimpse 6**. Draw six cards. Then **summon** a Spirit Shard token.
effect_raw: On Enter: Glimpse 6. Draw six cards. Then summon a Spirit Shard token.
flavor: Relentless hail stabs the frozen air. Hoarfrost chokes Krustal of life. Crystalline daggers of ice form from the deluge of rain as the fragmented leyline shatters.
name: Fragmented Spirit of Water

result_editions.flavor: "Do you know what it is like to lose everything? Let me show you."
"Ready to make some waves?"
“I must dispel my doubts and trust the path I’ve chosen. Only then can I prove my resolve.”

effect_html: On Enter: Glimpse 6. Draw six cards. Then summon a Spirit Shard token.

editions.flavor: Genbu, mythical Shenju of waves. Wash this land clean of strife and pain so that we may thrive again.
“The path ahead is mine, though I tread it without her light.”
“If I could peer into the tides of tomorrow, I’d choose to let them flow unseen.”
“Is it selfish, I wonder, to yearn for gentler days?”

effect: **On Enter**: **Glimpse 7**. Draw seven cards into your memory.

editions.flavor: The winds of change brought with them turbulence and strife. Only once these gusts were properly harnessed could true transformation take shape.
"What will the winds of tomorrow bring? A question for those privileged enough to ask."
"If you can't find a solution, simply make one!"
“When the storm within me awakens, even the sky trembles.”

effect: **On Enter:** **Glimpse 6**. Draw six cards. Then **summon** a Spirit Shard token.
effect_raw: On Enter: Glimpse 6. Draw six cards. Then summon a Spirit Shard token.
flavor: The thunderclouds darken above. Windscream pierces through the barriers of Winbless. Tempests of madness drive the fragmented leyline to the brink.
name: Fragmented Spirit of Wind

result_editions.flavor: “When the storm within me awakens, even the sky trembles.”
"If you can't find a solution, simply make one!"
"What will the winds of tomorrow bring? A question for those privileged enough to ask."

effect_html: On Enter: Glimpse 6. Draw six cards. Then summon a Spirit Shard token.

editions.flavor: Byakko, mythical Shenju of winds. Wipe this land free of sin and corruption so that we may rise again.
"How is it that you might measure the weight of something? Who is allowed to give it value?"
"I believe that even luck is a skill!"
“Through drifting winds, I carve my destiny.”

"Power only exists for those who seek it."

effect:
This card costs 1 less to materialize for each Chessman ally you control.

**Alice Lineage**

At the beginning of your recollection phase, **summon** a Pawn Piece token. Then if you control three or more Chessman allies, draw a card into your memory.
effect_raw:
This card costs 1 less to materialize for each Chessman ally you control.

Alice Lineage

At the beginning of your recollection phase, summon a Pawn Piece token. Then if you control three or more Chessman allies, draw a card into your memory.
name: Alice, Trifle's Royalty
effect_html: This card costs 1 less to materialize for each Chessman ally you control.Alice LineageAt the beginning of your recollection phase, summon a Pawn Piece token. Then if you control three or more Chessman allies, draw a card into your memory.

effect:
CARDNAME enters the field with **X** **page** counters on it, where **X** is the amount of damage counters on your champion.

Other objects you control have **spellshroud**.

At the beginning of your recollection phase, remove eight **page** counters from CARDNAME. If you do, draw a card. If you don't, you lose the game.
effect_raw:
Tome of Abyssal Heaven enters the field with X page counters on it, where X is the amount of damage counters on your champion.

Other objects you control have spellshroud.

At the beginning of your recollection phase, remove eight page counters from Tome of Abyssal Heaven. If you do, draw a card. If you don't, you lose the game.
name: Tome of Abyssal Heaven
effect_html: Tome of Abyssal Heaven enters the field with X page counters on it, where X is the amount of damage counters on your champion.Other objects you control have spellshroud.At the beginning of your recollection phase, remove eight page counters from Tome of Abyssal Heaven. If you do, draw a card. If you don't, you lose the game.

editions.effect:
Banish up to three advanced element cards from your hand and/or memory. Draw a card into your memory for each card banished this way. %The next time your champion levels up into a champion card with base level 3%% %%When your champion levels up into a champion card with base level 3 the next time this game%, put the banished cards on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order.

**Floating Memory**

rule.description: Angelic Channeling creates a delayed trigger that triggers the next time your champion levels up to base level 3 this game. This trigger is associated with the cards banished by during the resolution of Angelic Channeling. Resolving Angelic Channeling multiple times involves tracking which card(s) were banish for each resolution.

rule.title: ERRATA
rule.description: 'The next time..' -> 'When your champion levels up into a champion card with base level 3 the next time this game'

effect_html: Banish up to three advanced element cards from your hand and/or memory. Draw a card into your memory for each card banished this way. When your champion levels up into a champion card with base level 3 the next time this game, put the banished cards on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order.Floating Memory

effect:
While paying for this card's reserve cost, you may banish one or more cards named Crystal of Argus or Eye of Argus from your material deck. Each card banished this way pays for 3 of that cost.

**Taunt**, **True Sight**, **Vigor**

As long as CARDNAME is awake, it has **omnishroud**.
effect_raw:
While paying for this card's reserve cost, you may banish one or more cards named Crystal of Argus or Eye of Argus from your material deck. Each card banished this way pays for 3 of that cost.

Taunt, True Sight, Vigor

As long as Argus is awake, it has omnishroud.
name: Argus, All-Seeing Giant

effect:
**Crux & Tera Imbue 3** *(You may reserve all cards revealed as you activate this card. If at least three of them are crux and/or tera element, this card becomes **imbued**.)*

**On Enter:** If CARDNAME is **imbued**, reveal the top card of your deck and put it into your material deck **preserved**. Then you may banish a card from your material deck. If you do, CARDNAME gets +3[POWER] until end of turn.

Crux & Tera Imbue 3 (You may reserve all cards revealed as you activate this card. If at least three of them are crux and/or tera element, this card becomes imbued.)

"You're a funny looking raccoon. 
Are you lost? Follow me."

effect:
**On Enter:** **Scavenge 6** for a Raccoon ally card. *(To **scavenge** an amount, reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal that many cards or until you reveal the specified card. Put the specified card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your deck in a random order.)*

Raccoon allies you control have "[REST]: Banish target card in a graveyard."

effect:
**Command Chessman**

[Alice Bonus] As long as you control a Pawn unit, this card costs 2 less to activate. The same is true for Rook, Knight, Bishop, Queen, and King units.

[Alice Bonus] **On Hit:** At the beginning of your next recollection phase, you win the game.
effect_raw:
Command Chessman

[Alice Bonus] As long as you control a Pawn unit, this card costs 2 less to activate. The same is true for Rook, Knight, Bishop, Queen, and King units.

[Alice Bonus] On Hit: At the beginning of your next recollection phase, you win the game.
name: Golden Checkmate

effect:
**On Enter: **Search your deck for any amount of Angel ally cards. Banish those cards along with any amount of Angel ally cards from your hand, memory, and/or graveyard. Shuffle your deck. Then draw a card into your memory for each card banished from your hand and memory this way.

[Level 3+] (1), [REST]: Until end of turn, you may activate target card banished by CARDNAME.
effect_raw:
On Enter: Search your deck for any amount of Angel ally cards. Banish those cards along with any amount of Angel ally cards from your hand, memory, and/or graveyard. Shuffle your deck. Then draw a card into your memory for each card banished from your hand and memory this way.

[Level 3+] (1), REST: Until end of turn, you may activate target card banished by Seraphic Legion's Descent.
name: Seraphic Legion's Descent
effect_html: On Enter: Search your deck for any amount of Angel ally cards. Banish those cards along with any amount of Angel ally cards from your hand, memory, and/or graveyard. Shuffle your deck. Then draw a card into your memory for each card banished from your hand and memory this way.Level 3+ 1,: Until end of turn, you may activate target card banished by Seraphic Legion's Descent.

effect: **On Enter:** You may discard all cards in your hand and memory. If you do, **generate** an Arcane Sight, Astra Sight, Crux Sight, Exia Sight, Luxem Sight, Neos Sight, Tera Sight, and Umbra Sight card and put them into your memory. For the rest the game, ignore the elemental requirements of cards you activate with the same name as one of the **generated** cards.
effect_raw: On Enter: You may discard all cards in your hand and memory. If you do, generate an Arcane Sight, Astra Sight, Crux Sight, Exia Sight, Luxem Sight, Neos Sight, Tera Sight, and Umbra Sight card and put them into your memory. For the rest the game, ignore the elemental requirements of cards you activate with the same name as one of the generated cards.
name: Solomon, Master of Elements

rule.description: Solomon's ability allows you to ignore the elemental requirements of each card with the same name as the generated cards. This does not mean you can ignore the elemental requirements for other cards.

effect_html: On Enter: You may discard all cards in your hand and memory. If you do, generate an Arcane Sight, Astra Sight, Crux Sight, Exia Sight, Luxem Sight, Neos Sight, Tera Sight, and Umbra Sight card and put them into your memory. For the rest the game, ignore the elemental requirements of cards you activate with the same name as one of the generated cards.

effect:
**On Enter:** Put the top three cards of your deck into your graveyard.

Cards you activate, objects you control, and intents you control have an additional instance of each **deluge** ability and effect they have.
effect_raw:
On Enter: Put the top three cards of your deck into your graveyard.

Cards you activate, objects you control, and intents you control have an additional instance of each deluge ability and effect they have.
name: Ardus, Floodborne Deacon

rule.description: If an additional gained effect while its source is on the effects stack is lost due to the removal of Ardus, that source will still resolve as though it didn't have the additionally gained effect.
For additionally gained deluge effects that target, that effect must be present at the time it is added to the effects stack as well as during resolution for it to resolve properly.

If an effect that requires a target is gained after that effect is added to the effects stack, that source would fizzle due to not having the mandatory targets for resolution. For example, if Liquidation was activated, and Ardus was put onto the field at fast speed, Liquidation would now have two effects that each have a mandatory target. Because targets can no longer be assigned due to Liquidation already being activated, Liquidation fizzles.

For cards that gain deluge effects that target, it is important to assign which target is for the base effect and which target is for the gained effect. For example, if Liquidation's activation targets unit A with its base effect and unit B with its gained effect, the removal of Ardus before this activation's resolution would result in unit B no longer being targeted by Liquidation.

effect_html: On Enter: Put the top three cards of your deck into your graveyard.Cards you activate, objects you control, and intents you control have an additional instance of each deluge ability and effect they have.
